title: Archive Closeout Bounded Intent
goal: Implement #473 so archive closeout preserves bounded child intent satisfaction separately from parent-lane continuation.
non_goals: Do not remove parent-lane continuation pressure when no checked-in owner exists.
Do not add a new closeout command or top-level startup surface.

intent.outcome: Archive preparation and finished-work inspection distinguish completed child work from open parent-lane continuation.
intent.constraints: Keep provider and tracker assumptions out of the product; use checked-in planning state and structured issue-reference roles.
intent.latitude: Patch the smallest planning bootstrap behavior and regression tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the fix requires changing the public meaning of archive-and-close.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, commit, push, close #473, then continue #474.
execution.proof: planning package tests, planning surfaces, summary/reconcile/proof dogfooding

invariants: A completed child can have bounded intent satisfied while the parent lane remains open.
Open-parent archives must still name a checked-in continuation owner.
Finished-work inspection should not ask agents to re-promote a child whose continuation is already routed in active planning or roadmap state.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #449 makes package use cheaper than bypassing it by removing trust and workflow friction.

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #473, continue #474 or the next refreshed high-priority product friction lane

active_milestone.scope: Fix closeout intent normalization and continuation routing.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Preserve bounded intent satisfaction during archive closeout.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep the package repo-, provider-, tool-, and language-agnostic.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact helper names and regression test structure.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The fix would require changing issue tracker semantics into product core.

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, and close #473 with proof; then refresh and promote #474.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive-closeout-bounded-intent.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
completion_criteria: archive-plan --prepare-closeout preserves an existing yes bounded intent answer for archive-but-keep-lane-open.
archive validation accepts bounded intent satisfied with larger-intent status open when continuation owner is explicit.
planning summary does not create a derived follow-up candidate for a completed child whose parent/next refs are already routed in roadmap state.
External evidence includes #473/#474 in checked-in planning state.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: archive prepare preserves existing bounded intent satisfaction; archive validation allows explicit bounded satisfaction with open larger intent; finished-work inspection recognizes roadmap-routed continuations.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: planning package tests, focused tests, ruff, planning surface check, summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and proof-selected package commands passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: archived execplan and issue closeout proof

discard.summary: individual validation transcripts after proof and commit

continuation.summary: #474 owns the external-evidence refresh scope friction found during the same closeout.

config_check.summary: packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py guards archive prepare, archive validation, and roadmap-routed continuation behavior.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Preserve bounded intent satisfaction during archive closeout.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Behavior and tests now distinguish bounded child satisfaction from open parent-lane continuation.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane feature-tier-and-surface-merge activates a fresh bounded slice.

cost_assessment.workflow_cost_found: Agents had to manually repair archive residue and reason around false follow-up pressure after closing a completed child issue.
cost_assessment.architecture_cost_found: Closeout used one field to imply both bounded source intent and larger parent-lane state.
cost_assessment.needless_complexity_found: The fix avoided a new command by tightening existing closeout and summary behavior.
cost_assessment.surfaces_added: No new first-contact surface; one active plan was used for proof and will archive.
cost_assessment.surfaces_removed_merged_or_demoted: False historical audit pressure for roadmap-routed child continuations is backgrounded.
cost_assessment.artifact_footprint_changed: One active execplan will move to archive.
cost_assessment.human_steering_avoided_next_time: A future agent can archive a completed child with an open parent lane without hand-editing intent satisfaction.

improvement_signal_review.symptom: Archive closeout conflated child completion with parent continuation and created misleading autopilot pressure.
improvement_signal_review.owner: planning bootstrap archive closeout and finished-work inspection

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted from #438 dogfooding friction before lower-priority footprint/codegen lanes because false closeout pressure makes autopilot harder to trust.
2026-04-28: Kept the correction in existing planning closeout/reporting machinery rather than adding another workflow surface.

proof_report.validation proof: planning package tests, focused tests, ruff, planning surface check, summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and proof-selected package commands passed.
proof_report.proof achieved now: yes; validation evidence is recorded in execution summary.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: planning package tests, focused tests, ruff, planning surface check, summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and proof-selected package commands passed.
